rationale: Fresh documentation validation read the accepted feedback and documentation builds. KB content documents the accepted architecture decisions and codewiki_state refresh reports green health, but documentation build exit criteria are not met because frontmatter code_paths still reference target directories that do not exist before implementation migration. Frontmatter scan found 94 code_paths entries and 10 missing path prefixes.
checks: grep .codewiki/kb for scripts optional/non-authoritative semantics, skill-owned bootstrap/prompts/templates, src/ui web target, domain-led layering, application compilers/gateways/state-engine/tools, domain/state naming, and session queue scoped lease vocabulary
python scan of .codewiki/kb/**/*.md frontmatter code_paths -> 94 entries, 10 missing

issues.summary: Frontmatter code_paths reference nonexistent target dirs before implementation migration: .codewiki/kb/product/uis/control-room-details.md -> src/ui/web; .codewiki/kb/system/control-room-ui-details.md -> src/ui/web.

Frontmatter code_paths reference nonexistent target DDD dirs before implementation migration: .codewiki/kb/system/alignment-model.md -> src/application/state-engine, src/application/gateways, src/application/compilers; .codewiki/kb/system/audits.md -> src/application/gateways, src/application/state-engine, src/application/tools, src/domain/state; .codewiki/kb/system/change-lifecycle.md -> src/application/state-engine.
Documentation build evidence says frontmatter code_paths retain current existing implementation paths until migration, but several updated KB files use target paths that are not present in src yet.

failed_criteria: Documentation build exit criterion: Docs distinguish target paths from current frontmatter code_paths so generated state stays green until implementation moves files.
User validation criterion: frontmatter code_paths do not point to nonexistent target dirs before implementation migration.

isolation_requirement.reason: Fresh validation is preferred but not required for this profile.

isolation.notes: Fresh validation used build refs and KB files only; no implementation migration performed.
